sync-url.title: Sync URL
sync-url.description: URL for frontend nodes to poll for error page manifest (token embedded in path).

base-url.title: Base URL
base-url.description: Base URL for downloading haproxy error page files (token embedded in path).

operator-url.title: Operator URL
operator-url.description: URL of the error page manager web UI (token embedded in path).

certificate.title: TLS Certificate
certificate.description: PEM certificate of the error page manager (for SSL verification by frontend nodes).

slave-error-page-information.title: Slave Error Page Information
slave-error-page-information.description: JSON dict mapping slave references to their upload URLs (token embedded in URL).
